Name: DAMAGE_EFFECT_SFX_PARAM
Description: Defines visual effect IDs, sound intensity levels, and blood spatter settings used for damage impact effects of varying sizes and types.

Fields.Name: Set 0: SFX ID: Small
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for small impact effects in variation set 0.

Fields.Name: Set 0: SFX ID: Medium
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for medium impact effects in variation set 0.

Fields.Name: Set 0: SFX ID: Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for large impact effects in variation set 0.

Fields.Name: Set 0: SFX ID: Very Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for very large impact effects in variation set 0.

Fields.Name: Set 0: SFX ID: Massive
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for extremely large impact effects in variation set 0.

Fields.Name: Set 1: SFX ID: Small
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for small impact effects in variation set 1.

Fields.Name: Set 1: SFX ID: Medium
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for medium impact effects in variation set 1.

Fields.Name: Set 1: SFX ID: Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for large impact effects in variation set 1.

Fields.Name: Set 1: SFX ID: Very Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for very large impact effects in variation set 1.

Fields.Name: Set 1: SFX ID: Massive
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for extremely large impact effects in variation set 1.

Fields.Name: Set 2: SFX ID: Small
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for small impact effects in variation set 2.

Fields.Name: Set 2: SFX ID: Medium
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for medium impact effects in variation set 2.

Fields.Name: Set 2: SFX ID: Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for large impact effects in variation set 2.

Fields.Name: Set 2: SFX ID: Very Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for very large impact effects in variation set 2.

Fields.Name: Set 2: SFX ID: Massive
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for extremely large impact effects in variation set 2.

Fields.Name: Set 3: SFX ID: Small
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for small impact effects in variation set 3.

Fields.Name: Set 3: SFX ID: Medium
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for medium impact effects in variation set 3.

Fields.Name: Set 3: SFX ID: Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for large impact effects in variation set 3.

Fields.Name: Set 3: SFX ID: Very Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for very large impact effects in variation set 3.

Fields.Name: Set 3: SFX ID: Massive
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for extremely large impact effects in variation set 3.

Fields.Name: Set 4: SFX ID: Body Small
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for small body impact effects.

Fields.Name: Set 4: SFX ID: Body Medium
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for medium body impact effects.

Fields.Name: Set 4: SFX ID: Body Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for large body impact effects.

Fields.Name: Set 4: SFX ID: Body Very Large
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for very large body impact effects.

Fields.Name: Set 4: SFX ID: Body Massive
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for extremely large body impact effects.

Fields.Name: SFX ID: Critical
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used for critical hit effects.

Fields.Name: Follow Flag
Fields.Description: Determines whether the visual effect follows or remains attached to the target.

Fields.Name: Sound Level: Small
Fields.Description: Sound intensity level used for small impact effects.

Fields.Name: Sound Level: Medium
Fields.Description: Sound intensity level used for medium impact effects.

Fields.Name: Sound Level: Large
Fields.Description: Sound intensity level used for large impact effects.

Fields.Name: Sound Level: Very Large
Fields.Description: Sound intensity level used for very large impact effects.

Fields.Name: Sound Level: Massive
Fields.Description: Sound intensity level used for extremely large impact effects.

Fields.Name: Sound Level: Body
Fields.Description: Sound intensity level used for body impact effects.

Fields.Name: Sound Level: Critical
Fields.Description: Sound intensity level used for critical hit effects.

Fields.Name: Blood Spatter ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for the blood spatter effect triggered by the attack.
